description: Cross-language conformance for the item-item co-visit fact. (1) signing_bytes: the exact bytes a CoVisitFact signature covers for canonical inputs (item_a <= item_b) must be byte-identical on every platform, or signatures will not verify across clients. (2) canonical: create() must canonicalize an unordered pair to item_a <= item_b and cap the count at 1000, independent of the signing key.
